ADDICTION_BED_CAPACITIES.notes: Also has 19 post-detox recovery beds. Moved to Aurora Centre at 15625 Stony Plain Road in 2025.
24/7 detox and transitional program. Also operates shelter and supportive housing.
Publicly funded, abstinence-based, up to 1-year stay.
Originally announced as 75-bed facility. Long-term, live-in treatment.
Not yet open. Grande Prairie currently served by Northern Addictions Centre.
Located in Gunn, AB near Edmonton. Comprehensive recovery support for men.
Accredited residential recovery center serving women and their children.

ADDICTION_BED_CAPACITIES.siteName: Hull Services Radisson (Recovery Stabilization and Detox)

Alberta Hospital Edmonton - Youth Stabilization and Residential Services
Central Alberta's Safe Harbour Society for Health & Housing
Lethbridge Recovery Centre - Adult Detoxification Services
McMan Youth, Family and Community Association
Northeast Addiction and Mental Health Centre for Holistic Recovery
Fort McMurray Recovery Centre - Adult Residential Treatment
Addiction Recovery Centre - Adult Detoxification Services
The Salvation Army Keystone Residential Recovery

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Mental Health Helpline
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Confidential, anonymous service providing crisis intervention, information, and referral services.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Addiction Helpline
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Provides support, information, and referral options related to substance use, gambling, and misuse.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Suicide Crisis Helpline
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Confidential crisis intervention for anyone experiencing thoughts of suicide or distress.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Health Link Alberta
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Direct connection to registered nurses for health advice, triage, and local resource mapping.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: 211 Alberta Community Services
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Information and referral for community, social, and government services via chat, call, or text.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Indigenous Support Line
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Culturally safe support and navigation for Indigenous peoples, also accessible via 811.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Crisis Text Line
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Free, 24/7 text-based crisis support. Text CONNECT to 741741.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Family Violence Find Supports
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Confidential support, information, and referral for family violence concerns via chat, call, or text.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Income Supports
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Provincial contact centre for income, disability, and other social support programs.

SUPPORT_HELPLINES.name: Kids Help Phone
SUPPORT_HELPLINES.description: Confidential counselling and information for youth. Call 1-800-668-6868 or text CONNECT to 686868.
